/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libecl_linear_algebra.so.1.2.1 -o libecl_linear_algebra.so.1.2.1 CMakeFiles/ecl_linear_algebra.dir/sophus_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecl_linear_algebra.dir/sophus_interpolators.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_formatters/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_exceptions/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib:/home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib: /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_formatters/lib/libecl_formatters.so.1.2.1 /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_exceptions/lib/libecl_exceptions.so.1.2.1 /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_errors/lib/libecl_errors.so.1.2.0 /home/fbot/kobuki_base_ros2/install/ecl_type_traits/lib/libecl_type_traits.so.1.2.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/libceres.so.2.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglog.so.0.4.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libunwind.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 -lpthread
